bodies.name: Sun
bodies.description: The G-type main-sequence star that anchors the entire Solar System. Fusion-powered furnace providing all energy for life and fiction.

bodies.name: Mercury
bodies.description: Smallest planet, extreme temperature swings. Prime location for solar-power colonies in hard sci-fi.

bodies.name: Venus
bodies.description: Earth's toxic twin. Thick CO₂ atmosphere and runaway greenhouse — perfect for terraforming challenges.

bodies.name: Earth
bodies.description: Our blue marble. The only known world with liquid surface water and life — until the novel changes that.

bodies.name: Mars
bodies.description: The Red Planet. Future home of the first interplanetary civilization in our story.

bodies.name: Jupiter
bodies.description: Gas giant. Source of helium-3 for fusion drives and protector of the inner system.

bodies.name: Saturn
bodies.description: Magnificent ringed world. Ice mining operations and helium-3 harvesting hub.

bodies.name: Uranus
bodies.description: Ice giant, tilted on its side. Future outpost for deep-space refueling.

bodies.name: Neptune
bodies.description: Windy ice giant. Last stop before the Kuiper Belt in our novel's expansion.

bodies.name: Pluto
bodies.description: Icy world at the edge. Symbol of the frontier in hard sci-fi.

bodies.name: Moon
bodies.description: Earth's natural satellite. First stepping stone for humanity's expansion.

bodies.name: Phobos
bodies.description: Inner Martian moon. Future space elevator anchor.

bodies.name: Deimos
bodies.description: Outer Martian moon. Quiet research outpost in the novel.

bodies.name: Io
bodies.description: Most volcanically active body in the Solar System.

bodies.name: Europa
bodies.description: Icy moon with subsurface ocean — prime candidate for extraterrestrial life.

bodies.name: Ganymede
bodies.description: Largest moon in the Solar System. Magnetic field and possible ocean.

bodies.name: Callisto
bodies.description: Heavily cratered, ancient surface. Ideal for long-term bases.

bodies.name: Titan
bodies.description: Thick nitrogen atmosphere and methane lakes. Perfect for human settlement stories.
